_comment: Milestone 0 baseline scoreboard for the recitation + tajweed engines. Produced by the Swift harness (SiraatTests/RecitationEvalHarness.swift) over the in-CI synthetic fixtures. This is the 'before' every later milestone reports a delta against. The honesty numbers (hard_false_positive_rate, tajweed false_positive_rate) must never regress above 0. See eval/README.md.

follow_along.notes: The index matcher is honest (never hard-flags a correct reciter) but blind: it confirms nothing once a leading isti'adha or a repeated word shifts token alignment, and it detects zero real mistakes (recall 0). Milestone 2 (streaming alignment) targets follow_completeness > 0.95 on these; Milestone 3 (mistake detection) targets recall off the floor at >= 0.95 precision.

tajweed.notes: The character evaluator is precise and complete on the rules it covers (Madd length, Ghunnah duration, confident wrong letter). The gap is COVERAGE, not logic: qalqalah/idgham/ikhfa/iqlab are absent, the shipped blueprint is Al-Fatiha only and verified:false, and consonants stay ungraded until the model's romanization is confirmed. Production grading stays gated on source.verified == true (Qari sign-off).
